query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.full_name, u.role, GROUP_CONCAT(p.key) as permissions
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON u.id = up.user_id
LEFT JOIN permissions p ON up.permission_id = p.id
WHERE u.username = 'owner' OR u.role = 'admin'
GROUP BY u.id
LIMIT 5;
